10636511.title: Written In Blood
10636511.description: Crime novelist Simon Toyne examines some of the darkest real-life crime stories. He investigates the similarities between the works of famous writers and the grim realities of true crime.

10637478.title: Judge Judy
10637478.description: A woman fights with her ex-boyfriend over an oven.

10637559.title: Cheaters
10637559.description: Tony's suspicions are aroused when wife Becky misses their first wedding anniversary. David is worried about the lack of intimacy between him and wife Kim.

10638517.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10638517.description: A look at the life of the notorious murderer, who broke into a home and took the lives of three family members in a senseless killing.

10639449.title: Judge Judy
10639449.description: Neighbours accuse each other of child abuse and harassment. Then, a woman says her sister stole her TV while she was in jail.

10639521.title: Judge Judy
10639521.description: A disabled veteran, who says that a pit bull attacked his service dog, sues the owner for damages.

10640392.title: Judge Judy
10640392.description: A landlord says the police raided his property because of a tenant's teen parties. Then, a woman sues her ex and his mother for medical bills.

10640440.title: Something's Killing Me
10640440.description: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they - what causes them? And are they real?

10641380.title: Operation Repo
10641380.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10641488.title: Operation Repo
10641488.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10641576.title: Judge Judy
10641576.description: Glasses are broken during a drinking game. Then, a mother of two toddlers sues a caretaker for the return of pre-paid baby-sitting fees.

10642438.title: Judge Judy
10642438.description: Ex-friends argue over rent and utilities. Then, a former couple fight over accusations of assault and the return of a laptop.

10642521.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10642521.description: The concrete houseboat has collapsed, spilling trash everywhere. This forces the crew to split up into teams to complete the clean-up.

10643522.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10643522.description: The Chapmans have their work cut out for them when longtime friend Glenn Strickland asks the team to come to Houston and train his new, recently-married bounty hunters.

10644468.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10644468.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the story of a professional British cyclist involved in a horrific collision with a race support vehicle. Plus, a driver's dash cam records the moment a car pulls out in front of him leaving him with nowhere to go, and two men using an accelerant to start a bonfire get more than they bargained for.

10644535.title: Operation Repo
10644535.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10645412.title: Operation Repo
10645412.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10645496.title: Haunted Case Files
10645496.description: A woman and her teenage daughter are terrorised by apparitions, while in Arizona, something sinister is found lurking in an abandoned factory.

10646448.title: Judge Judy
10646448.description: A plaintiff says her son's fiancee destroyed her belongings and failed to pay rent. A woman wants her child's father to repay her for an amusement park pass. A defendant says he had no choice but to kick down his sister's door.

10646563.title: Judge Judy
10646563.description: A landlord sues a former tenant for a utility bill, property damage and vandalism.

10647378.title: Judge Judy
10647378.description: A woman sues the father of her child for unpaid rent; she says when he lost his job, he stopped paying his bills.

10647459.title: Operation Repo
10647459.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10647585.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10647585.description: The concrete houseboat has collapsed, spilling trash everywhere. This forces the crew to split up into teams to complete the clean-up.

10648508.title: The Day I Should Have Died
10648508.description: Declan Brady was on a flight from London to Belfast when the engine failed and the aircraft crashed. He managed to escape and get himself to safety.

10649417.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10649417.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the story of a professional British cyclist involved in a horrific collision with a race support vehicle. Plus, a driver's dash cam records the moment a car pulls out in front of him leaving him with nowhere to go, and two men using an accelerant to start a bonfire get more than they bargained for.

10649541.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10649541.description: The Chapmans have their work cut out for them when longtime friend Glenn Strickland asks the team to come to Houston and train his new, recently-married bounty hunters.

10650473.title: Judge Judy
10650473.description: A pregnant teen is sued for medical bills and property damage after she assaults another teen; a man sues former residents for leaving his duplex a mess.

10650556.title: Judge Judy
10650556.description: Men fight over damages after one punches the other; a former friend sues a teen for repayment of a loan.

10651400.title: Haunted Case Files
10651400.description: A woman and her teenage daughter are terrorised by apparitions, while in Arizona, something sinister is found lurking in an abandoned factory.

10651584.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10654514.description: A landlord sues a former tenant for a utility bill, property damage and vandalism.

10655371.title: Judge Judy
10655371.description: A woman sues the father of her child for unpaid rent; she says when he lost his job, he stopped paying his bills.

10655503.title: The Day I Should Have Died
10655503.description: Declan Brady was on a flight from London to Belfast when the engine failed and the aircraft crashed. He managed to escape and get himself to safety.

10656481.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10656481.description: Robert Benjamin Rhoades, also known as The Truck Stop Killer, is an American serial killer and rapist. He was convicted for three murders, but it is estimated that he is responsible for dozens more.

10657389.title: Cheaters
10657389.description: Robley frets when his wife starts going out with her friends every night; Sharon and Jerome have six kids between them, but he doesn't want to play happy families.

10658366.title: Wives With Knives
10658366.description: Karen Miller's new romance with a co-worker is fuelled by alcohol and abuse, then she is forced to defend herself against him by plunging a knife into his neck.

10658593.title: Paranormal Survivor
10658593.description: A couple begins to witness spine-chilling apparitions in their apartment. A young woman has terrifying recurring dreams that tragically come true.
